name: Performapal Corn
desc: Once per turn, during your Main Phase, if this card was Normal or Special Summoned this turn: You can target 1 other "Performapal" monster you control with 1000 or less ATK; change both it and this card, that you control, from face-up Attack Position to Defense Position, and if you do, add 1 "Odd-Eyes" monster from your Deck to your hand. During your opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can banish 1 "Performapal" monster, except "Performapal Corn", and this card from your GY; gain 500 LP.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, during your Main Phase, if this card was Normal or Special Summoned this turn: You can target 1 other "Performapal" monster you control with 1000 or less ATK; change both it and this card, that you control, from face-up Attack Position to Defense Position, and if you do, add 1 "Odd-Eyes" monster from your Deck to your hand. During your opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can banish 1 "Performapal" monster, except "Performapal Corn", and this card from your GY; gain 500 LP.

sets.set: Dragons of Legend: The Complete Series

jp_sets.set: Collectors Pack: Duelist of Flash Version

action: Activates during the turn in which it was Normal Summoned
Activates during the turn in which it was Special Summoned
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
